title: Functional connectomics spanning multiple areas of mouse visual cortex
abstract: The MICrONS functional connectomics dataset includes dense calcium imaging of ~75,000 neurons co-registered with an EM reconstruction of >200,000 cells and 0.5 billion synapses. Jake Reimer led the functional imaging component at Baylor.
notes: Cross-listed with Reid, da Costa, Tolias. Reimer led functional imaging at Baylor College of Medicine.
